extracted.title: Moss Bluff Storage Conditions for 3/28/2026
extracted.description:
The following restriction will be in place on the Moss Bluff Storage (Moss Bluff) system for Gas Day March 28, 2026:

Moss Bluff has restricted a portion of excess injections. No increases in injections will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
